subcodes.first_line: O thou servant of God! The Most Great Beauty hath guided and directed the world unto righteousness and prosperity, that the root of corruption [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی جمال کبریاء جهان را بصلاح و فلاح دلالت و هدایت فرمود تا ریشه فساد
subcodes.subjects: @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @material and spiritual existence; two books
